ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Type your message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
ast.target: 输入您的消息...（Enter 发送，Shift+Enter 换行）

ast.name: title
ast.target: 切换智能体模式（自主工具使用）

ast.name: title
ast.source: Enable thinking mode (model reasons before responding)
ast.target: 启用思考模式（模型在响应前进行推理）

ast.name: error
ast.source: Agent run failed, falling back to direct chat:
ast.target: 智能体运行失败，回退到直接对话：

ast.name: error
ast.source: [AgentModeRunner] Failed to parse tool arguments, skipping:
ast.target: [AgentModeRunner] 解析工具参数失败，跳过：

ast.name: error
ast.target: [MemoryManager] 跳过无法读取的记忆文件：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pro license key from Lemon Squeezy. Leave empty for Free tier.
ast.target: 来自 Lemon Squeezy 的专业版许可证密钥。留空则为免费版。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Base URL for the API endpoint

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Query LM Studio's /v1/models endpoint to discover loaded models
ast.target: 查询 LM Studio 的 /v1/models 端点以发现已加载的模型

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 控制随机性（0.0 = 确定性，2.0 = 非常随机）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 响应中的最大 token 数

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 核采样（0.0-1.0）。值越低，结果越聚焦

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Limits token selection to top K (0 = disabled)
ast.target: 将 token 选择限制在前 K 个（0 = 禁用）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Penalizes repeated tokens (0-2). Higher = less repetition
ast.target: 惩罚重复的 token（0-2）。值越高，重复越少

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use DeepSeek V4 thinking/reasoning (incompatible with temperature/top_p/presence_penalty)
ast.target: 使用 DeepSeek V4 思考/推理模式（与 temperature/top_p/presence_penalty 不兼容）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only applies when thinking mode is enabled (DeepSeek V4)
ast.target: 仅在启用思考模式时适用（DeepSeek V4）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of previous turns to include in context
ast.target: 上下文中包含的前几轮对话数量

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of chunks to retrieve per query

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 每块的近似 token 数

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: URL of the browser-use Python microservice
ast.target: 浏览器使用 Python 微服务的 URL

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How many web results to return

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Authentication token shared with the Python search server (must match server's COPILOT_WEB_TOKEN)
ast.target: 与 Python 搜索服务器共享的认证令牌（必须与服务器的 COPILOT_WEB_TOKEN 匹配）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow drag & drop of images into chat
ast.target: 允许将图片拖放到聊天中

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Save conversations as markdown files in the vault
ast.target: 将对话保存为保险库中的 markdown 文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder to store chat history files
ast.target: 存储聊天历史文件的文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remember key facts between chat sessions
ast.target: 在聊天会话之间记住关键事实

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 存储记忆文件的文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of recent memories to load on new chat
ast.target: 新聊天时加载的最近记忆数量

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of tool calls per agent run
ast.target: 每次代理运行的最大工具调用次数

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: URL of your LM Studio server
ast.target: 你的 LM Studio 服务器的 URL

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 用于视觉/图像任务的模型名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: API key (leave empty if not required)
ast.target: API 密钥（如果不需要则留空）

ast.name: setText
ast.source: No models found. Load a model in LM Studio first.
ast.target: 未找到模型。请先在 LM Studio 中加载一个模型。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 清除许可证（恢复为免费版）

ast.name: warn
ast.source: using deprecated parameters for `initSync()`; pass a single object instead
ast.target: `initSync()` 使用了已弃用的参数；请改为传递单个对象

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [HybridRetriever] Embedding generation failed, falling back to text-only:
ast.target: [HybridRetriever] 嵌入生成失败，回退到纯文本模式：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Reranker] External reranker failed, falling back to local scoring:
ast.target: [Reranker] 外部重排序器失败，回退到本地评分：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [AgentModeRunner] All JSON extraction strategies failed for:
ast.target: [AgentModeRunner] 所有 JSON 提取策略均失败，针对：

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 未找到已保存的聊天记录。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: ✅ 专业版许可证激活成功。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Index file appears corrupted or failed to load. Try clearing and re-indexing.
ast.target: 索引文件似乎已损坏或加载失败。请尝试清除并重新索引。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Vault indexing complete, but no files were indexed. Check excluded folders or try again.
ast.target: 保险库索引完成，但未索引任何文件。请检查排除的文件夹或重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Vault indexing produced EMPTY vectors. Your embedding model does not generate embeddings. Load a dedicated embedding model (nomic-embed-text, all-MiniLM-L6-v2) in LM Studio and set it in Settings → Embedding Model, then clear & re-index.
ast.target: 保险库索引产生了空向量。您的嵌入模型未生成嵌入。请在 LM Studio 中加载一个专用的嵌入模型（如 nomic-embed-text、all-MiniLM-L6-v2），并在设置 → 嵌入模型中进行设置，然后清除并重新索引。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: ⚠️ Daily limit reached. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited messages.
ast.target: ⚠️ 已达每日限制。升级至专业版以获得无限消息。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Summarize the following content in 1-2 concise sentences. Keep key facts, names, and numbers. Output only the summary, no preamble.
ast.target: 请用1-2个简洁的句子总结以下内容。保留关键事实、名称和数字。仅输出总结，无需引言。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Extract 3-5 key facts, decisions, and user preferences from this conversation. Output only the facts as bullet points. Be concise.
ast.target: 从本次对话中提取3-5个关键事实、决策和用户偏好。仅以要点形式输出事实。请保持简洁。

ast.name: content
ast.source: You are a task classifier. Output only valid JSON arrays.
ast.target: 你是一个任务分类器。仅输出有效的JSON数组。

ast.name: content
ast.source: All planned steps are complete. Provide your final answer now.
ast.target: 所有计划步骤均已完成。请立即提供你的最终答案。

ast.name: content
ast.source: ALL tools are now DISABLED. You have enough information. Based ONLY on what's already in this conversation, provide your final answer NOW using <!--save:path.md--> to save. Use [[wiki-links]]. Do NOT call tools.
ast.target: 所有工具现已禁用。你已拥有足够信息。仅基于本次对话中已有的内容，立即提供你的最终答案，并使用 <!--save:path.md--> 保存。使用 [[wiki-links]]。请勿调用工具。

ast.name: content
content
ast.source: ⚠️ You are deviating from the plan. Check the PLAN above — execute the → step.
ast.target: ⚠️ 你正在偏离计划。请检查上方的计划 — 执行 → 步骤。

ast.name: content
ast.source: You have reached the maximum number of actions. Based on ALL tool results received so far, provide a complete final answer NOW. Summarize what you found. Do NOT ask for more information or describe what you would do next — this is your FINAL response.
ast.target: 你已达到最大操作次数。基于迄今为止收到的所有工具结果，立即提供一个完整的最终答案。总结你的发现。请勿要求更多信息或描述你接下来会做什么 — 这是你的最终回复。

ast.name: content
ast.target: 请保持简洁且乐于助人。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Searches vault notes modified between two dates in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss). Useful to see what the user did in a time period.
ast.target: 搜索在ISO 8601格式（YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss）的两个日期之间修改过的保险库笔记。可用于查看用户在某个时间段内的活动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Start date in ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2026-05-01T00:00:00

ast.name: description
ast.source: End date in ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2026-05-10T23:59:59

ast.name: description
ast.source: Searches vault notes using semantic search (RAG). Returns relevant fragments based on the query.
ast.target: 使用语义搜索（RAG）搜索保险库笔记。根据查询返回相关片段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Analyzes an image from the vault and provides a detailed description. Use the image path (e.g. 'folder/diagram.png'). Supports png, jpg, jpeg, gif, webp.
ast.target: 分析保险库中的图像并提供详细描述。使用图像路径（例如 'folder/diagram.png'）。支持 png、jpg、jpeg、gif、webp 格式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to the image file within the vault.
ast.target: 保险库内图像文件的路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets the transcript (subtitles) of a YouTube video from its URL.
ast.target: 从YouTube视频的URL获取其字幕（字幕）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: YouTube video URL (e.g. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=... or https://youtu.be/...).
ast.target: YouTube视频URL（例如 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=... 或 https://youtu.be/...）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Performs a web search using an automated browser and returns the most relevant results (title, url, snippet).
ast.target: 使用自动化浏览器执行网络搜索，并返回最相关的结果（标题、网址、摘要）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creates a new note in the vault with the given title and content (Markdown format).
ast.target: 在保险库中创建一个具有给定标题和内容（Markdown格式）的新笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Searches files in the vault by name pattern. Returns paths of matching files. Useful for finding images, PDFs or notes when you don't know the exact path.
ast.target: 按名称模式搜索保险库中的文件。返回匹配文件的路径。当您不知道确切路径时，可用于查找图像、PDF或笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Part of the file name to search for (e.g. 'MapaPolitico', 'diagram', 'photo.png'). Case-insensitive.
ast.target: 要搜索的文件名部分（例如 'MapaPolitico'、'diagram'、'photo.png'）。不区分大小写。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 按扩展名过滤（例如 'png'、'pdf'、'md'）。可选。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reads the full content of a note from the vault. Accepts note name with or without .md extension and with or without path. E.g. '01_02_Qualitaet_als_Erfolgsfaktor', 'Folder/MyNote.md'. Ideal for consulting previously saved notes.
ast.target: 从保险库中读取笔记的完整内容。接受带或不带.md扩展名、带或不带路径的笔记名称。例如 '01_02_Qualitaet_als_Erfolgsfaktor'、'Folder/MyNote.md'。非常适合查阅先前保存的笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Note name or path (with or without .md, with or without folder). E.g. '01_02_Qualitaet_als_Erfolgsfaktor' or '10_Mundo/ReinosDeAcanthia.md'.
ast.target: 笔记名称或路径（带或不带.md，带或不带文件夹）。例如 '01_02_Qualitaet_als_Erfolgsfaktor' 或 '10_Mundo/ReinosDeAcanthia.md'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Overwrites the content of an existing note in the vault. Use the full path. If the note does not exist, it returns an error (use create_note for new notes).
ast.target: 覆盖保险库中现有笔记的内容。使用完整路径。如果笔记不存在，则返回错误（对于新笔记请使用create_note）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Full path of the note to modify (e.g. '10_Mundo/Reinos.md').
ast.target: 要修改的笔记的完整路径（例如 '10_Mundo/Reinos.md'）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: New full content of the note in Markdown format.
ast.target: Markdown格式的笔记新完整内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Extracts text from a PDF. REQUIRES pagesOnly for large PDFs (>20 pages). Use pagesOnly: '116-138' for specific pages. Use tocOnly: true for the table of contents. Without parameters it only works on PDFs of ≤20 pages.
ast.target: 从PDF中提取文本。对于大型PDF（>20页）需要使用pagesOnly参数。使用 pagesOnly: '116-138' 指定特定页面。使用 tocOnly: true 获取目录。不带参数时仅适用于≤20页的PDF。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to the PDF in the vault.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only returns the PDF table of contents / TOC.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Renders specific PDF pages as PNG images and saves them in the vault. Returns exact paths (e.g. 'Resources/PDF_images/PDF_page_40.png'). IMPORTANT: use the EXACT paths returned by this tool for ![[embeds]]. Do NOT invent paths.
ast.target: 将特定PDF页面渲染为PNG图像并保存在保险库中。返回确切路径（例如 'Resources/PDF_images/PDF_page_40.png'）。重要提示：对于 ![[embeds]]，请使用此工具返回的确切路径。请勿自行编造路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Folder to save the images (optional, default: next to PDF).
ast.target: 保存图像的文件夹（可选，默认：PDF旁边）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Extracts embedded JPG/PNG images from PDF pages. Requires 'unpdf' installed (npm install unpdf). If no raster images (vector graphics/diagrams), renders the full page as PNG. Use render_pdf_pages if you only need full pages.
ast.target: 从PDF页面中提取嵌入的JPG/PNG图像。需要安装 'unpdf'（npm install unpdf）。如果没有光栅图像（矢量图形/图表），则将整个页面渲染为PNG。如果只需要完整页面，请使用 render_pdf_pages。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lists notes in a vault folder (or root if not specified).
ast.target: 列出保险库文件夹中的笔记（如果未指定，则列出根目录）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Folder to list (optional). If not specified, lists root.
ast.target: 要列出的文件夹（可选）。如果未指定，则列出根目录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Searches exact text across all vault notes (faster than semantic search).
ast.target: 在所有保险库笔记中搜索精确文本（比语义搜索更快）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns vault statistics: number of notes, total size, folders.
ast.target: 返回保险库统计信息：笔记数量、总大小、文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the content of the file currently open in the editor.
ast.target: 返回编辑器中当前打开文件的内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Extracts the frontmatter (YAML metadata) from a note.
ast.target: 从笔记中提取前置信息（YAML元数据）。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 演示密钥需要调试模式（COPILOT_DEBUG=1）。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Could not reach license server. Check your internet connection.
ast.target: 无法连接到许可证服务器。请检查您的互联网连接。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Copilot: Index vault for semantic search
ast.target: Copilot: 为语义搜索索引库

ast.name: name
ast.target: Copilot: 清除语义搜索索引

ast.name: name
ast.target: Copilot: 将聊天保存到文件

ast.name: name
ast.target: Copilot: 将聊天导出为 Markdown

ast.name: name
ast.target: Copilot: 将聊天导出为 JSON

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click 'Detect' to fetch available models from LM Studio.
ast.target: 点击“检测”以从 LM Studio 获取可用模型。

ast.name: text
ast.source: 🔒 Multi-provider fallback requires a Pro license. With Pro, you can use a second provider for capabilities your primary provider lacks.
ast.target: 🔒 多提供商回退需要专业版许可证。使用专业版，您可以为您的主要提供商缺乏的功能使用第二个提供商。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Describe this image in detail. If it contains text, diagrams, charts or tables, describe them accurately.
ast.target: 详细描述此图像。如果包含文本、图表、图表或表格，请准确描述它们。
